_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
author: admin@playerbot
name: Playerbot Support
description: Discord support bot with built-in Lavalink v4 music server. Runs Java 21 (Lavalink) and Python 3.12 in a single container.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y curl wget git python3 python3-pip python3-venv

INSTALL_DIR="/mnt/user-data/volumes/${P_SERVER_UUID}"
REPO="${GITHUB_REPO:-https://github.com/scarecr0w12/Playerbot-support.git}"
BRANCH="${GITHUB_BRANCH:-main}"

# ── Clone / update bot source ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
if [ -d "${INSTALL_DIR}/.git" ]; then
    echo "Updating existing repository..."
    git -C "${INSTALL_DIR}" fetch origin
    git -C "${INSTALL_DIR}" reset --hard "origin/${BRANCH}"
else
    echo "Cloning ${REPO} (branch: ${BRANCH})..."
    git clone --depth=1 --branch "${BRANCH}" "${REPO}" "${INSTALL_DIR}"
fi

# ── Python deps ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cd "${INSTALL_DIR}"
if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
    echo "Installing Python dependencies..."
    pip3 install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
fi

# ── Lavalink ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
mkdir -p "${INSTALL_DIR}/lavalink"
cd "${INSTALL_DIR}/lavalink"

LAVALINK_VERSION="${LAVALINK_VERSION:-4.0.8}"
JAR_URL="https://github.com/lavalink-devs/Lavalink/releases/download/${LAVALINK_VERSION}/Lavalink.jar"
echo "Downloading Lavalink ${LAVALINK_VERSION}..."
wget -q -O Lavalink.jar "${JAR_URL}"
echo "Lavalink.jar downloaded."

# application.yml ships in the repo under lavalink/ — only write a fallback
# if the clone somehow didn't include it
if [ ! -f application.yml ]; then
    echo "WARNING: lavalink/application.yml not found in repo — writing default."
    cat > application.yml << 'LAVACONF'
server:
  port: 2333
  address: 0.0.0.0

plugins:
  youtube:
    enabled: true
    allowSearch: true
    allowDirectVideoIds: true
    allowDirectPlaylistIds: true
    clients:
      - MUSIC
      - ANDROID_TESTSUITE
      - WEB
      - TVHTML5EMBEDDED
  lavasrc:
    providers:
      - "ytsearch:\"%ISRC%\""
      - "ytsearch:%QUERY%"
      - "scsearch:%QUERY%"
    sources:
      spotify: true
      applemusic: false
      deezer: false
      yandexmusic: false
      youtube: true
    lyrics-sources:
      spotify: false
      deezer: false
      youtube: true
      yandexmusic: false
    spotify:
      clientId: "${SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID:}"
      clientSecret: "${SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET:}"
      countryCode: "US"
      playlistLoadLimit: 6
      albumLoadLimit: 6

lavalink:
  plugins:
    - dependency: "dev.lavalink.youtube:youtube-plugin:1.11.4"
      snapshot: false
    - dependency: "com.github.topi314.lavasrc:lavasrc-plugin:4.4.1"
      repository: "https://maven.lavalink.dev/releases"
      snapshot: false
  server:
    password: "${LAVALINK_PASSWORD:youshallnotpass}"
    sources:
      youtube: false
      bandcamp: true
      soundcloud: true
      twitch: true
      vimeo: true
      http: true
      local: false
    filters:
      volume: true
      equalizer: true
      karaoke: true
      timescale: true
      tremolo: true
      vibrato: true
      distortion: true
      rotation: true
      channelMix: true
      lowPass: true
LAVACONF
fi

echo "Installation complete."

variables.name: GitHub Repository
variables.description: Full HTTPS URL of the GitHub repository to clone.

variables.name: GitHub Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone from the repository.

variables.name: Discord Bot Token
variables.description: Your Discord bot token from the developer portal.

variables.name: LLM API Key
variables.description: API key for the LLM provider.

variables.name: Dashboard Port
variables.description: Port the web dashboard runs on.

variables.name: Qdrant URL
variables.description: URL of your Qdrant vector database instance.

variables.name: Lavalink Password
variables.description: Password for the Lavalink server (must match application.yml).

variables.name: Lavalink URI
variables.description: URI the Python bot uses to connect to Lavalink. Use http://127.0.0.1:2333 when running in the same container.

variables.name: Lavalink Port
variables.description: Port Lavalink listens on inside the container.

variables.name: Lavalink Memory (MB)
variables.description: Max heap memory allocated to the Lavalink JVM.

variables.name: Lavalink Version
variables.description: Lavalink release version to download during installation.

variables.name: Spotify Client ID
variables.description: Spotify Web API client ID for LavaSrc (optional).

variables.name: Spotify Client Secret
variables.description: Spotify Web API client secret for LavaSrc (optional).

variables.name: Discord OAuth Client ID
variables.description: Discord OAuth2 client ID for the dashboard.

variables.name: Discord OAuth Client Secret
variables.description: Discord OAuth2 client secret for the dashboard.

variables.name: Discord OAuth Redirect URI
variables.description: Full redirect URI registered in your Discord OAuth2 app (e.g. http://your-ip:8080/auth/discord/callback).

variables.name: Bot Owner Discord ID
variables.description: Discord user ID with master dashboard access across all guilds.
